acceptance_criteria.text: Supervised outreach send capability must require a drafts approval, not any earlier approval gate.
proof: Default blueprint send step includes required_approval_type=drafts.
Runner uses _has_required_approval(run_id, step) before executing dangerous capability steps.
test_runner_blocks_send_capability_without_required_drafts_approval proves shortlist approval alone does not invoke the orchestrator.

acceptance_criteria.text: Dangerous capabilities must require human review through ActionOrchestrator policy by default.
proof: src/core/action_policy.py has generic dangerous capability fallback policy.
test_risk_policy_requires_human_for_dangerous_capabilities covers send, publish, payment, and delete capabilities.
Live policy check for outreach.send_batch returned requires_human=True.
gaps: Generic fallback is name-based; explicit per-capability policies can be added later.

acceptance_criteria.text: Outreach dispatcher must be explicit opt-in in worker runtime and compose, with default disabled.
proof: src/worker.py defaults OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED to false.
docker-compose.yml exposes OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED=false for app and worker unless explicitly overridden.
lint_backend_baseline checks worker default and compose markers.
Production worker env returned false.

acceptance_criteria.text: Agent Blueprint runtime may queue approved outreach batches but must not dispatch externally by itself.
proof: Blueprint capability execution remains routed through ActionOrchestrator.
outreach.send_batch remains a queueing capability.
Production worker dispatcher is disabled and logs contained no OUTREACH_DISPATCH activity.
gaps: Full sourcing-to-send supervised outreach integration remains a separate P1/P2 task.

acceptance_criteria.text: Backend lint guardrails and targeted tests must pass.
proof: Targeted pytest command passed with 27 tests.
Local py_compile passed for scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py.
scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh passed and runs scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py.
gaps: Full test suite not run for this narrow task.

acceptance_criteria.text: Production deploy must be verified with app/worker health, dispatcher disabled in worker env, and no dispatch activity after restart.
proof: Commit 6cd7947 scripts/tests were synced to /opt/seo-app.
Server-side scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py passed.
Production docker compose ps showed app, worker, and postgres up.
curl -I http://localhost:8000 returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK.
Worker printenv OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED returned false.
gaps: No runtime restart was needed for script/test-only changes.

acceptance_criteria.text: Static approval-boundary audit fails on direct Blueprint/Operator dispatch/provider-send bypasses and missing billing/manual-publication markers.
proof: scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py rejects direct Blueprint dispatcher/provider send calls.
scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py rejects direct Operator external send/dispatch calls.
scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py requires Blueprint ActionOrchestrator, approval, billing, and queued-not-dispatched markers.
scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py requires Operator preflight/reserve/finalize and external_writes_performed=false markers.
tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py imports and runs the audit checks.
gaps: Static marker checks are intentionally conservative; behavior tests remain the semantic proof.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py

ssh -i ~/.ssh/localos_prod -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I http://localhost:8000 && docker compose exec -T worker sh -lc "printenv OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED"'
known_gaps: Full supervised outreach sourcing/drafting integration is still pending.
